overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in Western attire exploring a desert landscape with iconic mesa and butte formations. The character transitions from walking to running along a dirt trail, approaching a large rock formation labeled 'Alta Cabeza' under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert valley with towering rock buttes

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking then running along the dirt path toward the distant rock formations, wearing a poncho and cowboy hat

entered.detail: tall narrow rock spire rising prominently against the sky
large flat-topped butte with layered red rock strata
low-lying green-gray desert vegetation scattered along the trail
sandy brown path winding through the desert terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a cowboy character walking through a sunlit desert valley. Two massive rock formations dominate the horizon ahead. The character transitions to a run at around 11 seconds, kicking up dust on the dirt trail while sparse desert vegetation lines the path.

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the desert valley, navigating between scrub bushes and maintaining pace on the uneven terrain

entered.detail: smaller reddish rock formation near the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through the wide desert valley. The perspective shifts as the character moves between the two major rock formations, with the flat-topped mesa gradually moving to center frame and growing larger. A red rock outcrop appears near the path on the left.

events.description: location name 'ALTA CABEZA' appears on screen indicating discovery of the rock formation

agents.ego_description: running directly toward the large flat-topped mesa, closing the distance significantly

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive flat-topped mesa that now dominates the center view. The terrain remains arid with scattered bushes. At the end of the segment, the on-screen text 'ALTA CABEZA' identifies the formation as the character nears its base.

agents.ego_description: running along the base of the large mesa, following the curving dirt path around the rock formation

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character running along the base of Alta Cabeza, with the massive rock wall now on the left. The trail curves around the formation, and the tall spire butte is visible in the distance to the right. The character continues along the path as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit desert valley that gradually closes in as the character approaches a massive rock formation. It begins with a cowboy walking through an arid landscape toward two distant rock formations, before transitioning into a run that kicks up dust along a dirt trail lined with sparse vegetation. As the character moves deeper into the valley, the perspective shifts to center a flat-topped mesa that grows larger in the frame, passing a red rock outcrop on the left. The scene then expands as the character nears the base of the formation, where the text Alta Cabeza appears to identify the towering cliff. Finally, the camera follows the character as they run along the base of the massive rock wall, curving around the formation with a tall spire butte visible in the distance.
